results.title: Stock picks of the week: 6 stocks with consistent score improvement and upside potential of up to 29%
results.description: At a time when there are so many headwinds for the markets, it is tough to imagine that things can get better. But sentiment is a fickle thing and can change before you know it. And by the time you figure out why, the market would have moved on. So, while there is no doubt that more headwinds await the Indian economy, it is probably time to look beyond – at a few things that are not obvious. Our selected stocks for today depict a strong upward trajectory in their overall average score which is based on five key pillars: Earnings, fundamentals, relative valuation, risk, and price momentum. This implies that there has been a significant improvement in their market outlook in the given time frame
